data.question: Please give me the number of employees.
data.js_query_ref: var result=data.employees.length;
data.sql_query_ref: select count(*) from employees

data.question: Please give me the names of all employees.
data.js_query_ref: var result=data.employees.map(x=>x.name);
data.sql_query_ref: select name from employees

data.question: Please give me the email addresses of all employees.
data.js_query_ref: var result=data.employees.map(x=>x.profile.contact.email);
data.sql_query_ref: select email from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join contact on profile_id=profile.id

data.question: Please give me the addresses of employee Sara Rivera.
data.sql_query_ref: select street, city from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join contact on profile_id=profile.id join address on contact_id=contact.Id where employees.name='Sara Rivera'

data.question: Please give me all project names.
data.sql_query_ref: select name from projects

data.question: What is the count of all projects.
data.js_query_ref: var count_projects=0;data.employees.map(employee => { count_projects=count_projects + employee.profile.projects.length });var result=count_projects;
data.sql_query_ref: select count(*) from projects

data.question: Which employee has the project Incubate World-Class Schemas.
data.sql_query_ref: select employees.name from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id where projects.name='Incubate World-Class Schemas'

data.question: Please give me the tasks descriptions of employee Tommy Parker
data.js_query_ref: var tasks=[]; data.employees.filter(emp => emp.name==='Tommy Parker').map(emplo=>{emplo.profile.projects.map(proj=>{proj.tasks.map(task=>tasks.push(task.description))})});var result=tasks;
data.sql_query_ref: select tasks.description from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id join tasks on projects_id=projects.id where employees.name='Tommy Parker'

data.question: Which employee has JavaScript as primary skill in their project?
data.sql_query_ref: select employees.name from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id join tasks on projects_id=projects.id join assignedTo on tasks_id=tasks.id join skills on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id where skills."primary"='JavaScript'

data.question: Which employees have Healthcare as domain experience in their project?
data.sql_query_ref: select employees.name from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id join tasks on projects_id=projects.id join assignedTo on tasks_id=tasks.id join skills on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join experience on skills_id = skills.Id join domains on experience_id = experience.id  where domains.value='Healthcare'

data.question: Which employees have Healthcare or E-commerce as domain experience in their project?
data.sql_query_ref: select distinct employees.name from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id join tasks on projects_id=projects.id join assignedTo on tasks_id=tasks.id join skills on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join experience on skills_id = skills.Id join domains on experience_id = experience.id  where domains.value in ('Healthcare','E-commerce')

data.question: Which employees have Healthcare and E-commerce as domain experience in their project?
data.sql_query_ref:
select employees.name from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id join tasks on projects_id=projects.id join assignedTo on tasks_id=tasks.id join skills on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join experience on skills_id = skills.Id 
 where 
 exists (
  select * from  domains where  
   experience_Id=  experience.Id 
  and value= 'Healthcare'--,'E-commerce')
 )
 and
 exists (
  select * from  domains where  
   experience_Id=  experience.Id 
  and value= 'E-commerce'
 )

data.question: Which employees has a certificate updated after 2025-08-01
data.sql_query_ref: select distinct employees.name from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id join tasks on projects_id=projects.id join assignedTo on tasks_id=tasks.id join skills on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join experience on skills_id = skills.Id  join certifications on experience_id=experience.id join meta on certifications_id=certifications.id where lastUpdated>'2025-08-01'

data.question: Which employees have the greatest experience?
data.sql_query_ref: select employees.name from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id join tasks on projects_id=projects.id join assignedTo on tasks_id=tasks.id join skills on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join experience on skills_id = skills.Id where experience.years=(select max(years) from  experience)

data.question: Which employees live north of 50°?
data.sql_query_ref: select employees.name  from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join contact on profile_id=profile.id join address on contact_id=contact.Id join location on address_id=address.Id join geo on location_id=location.Id where CAST(geo.lat as REAL) >50

data.question: In wich different timezones employees lives?
data.sql_query_ref: select distinct timezone.name from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join contact on profile_id=profile.id join address on contact_id=contact.Id join location on address_id=address.Id join geo on location_id=location.Id join timezone on geo_id=geo.Id

data.question:
Wich employees have the same timezone?
(use name only to identify employee)
data.sql_query_ref: select timezone.name as timezoneName,employees.name as employeesName from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join contact on profile_id=profile.id join address on contact_id=contact.Id join location on address_id=address.Id join geo on location_id=location.Id join timezone on geo_id=geo.Id  order by timezone.name,employees.name

data.question: What is the most common domain experience?
data.sql_query_ref: select value, count(*) as count from domains group by value order by count desc limit 1

data.question: Please give me the number of skills per employee. Use only the primary and secondary skills.
data.sql_query_ref: select name,count(*) as count from( select employees.name, skills."primary"  as skill from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id join tasks on projects_id=projects.id join assignedTo on tasks_id=tasks.id join skills on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id union select employees.name, secondary.value as skill from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id join tasks on projects_id=projects.id join assignedTo on tasks_id=tasks.id join skills on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join secondary on skills_id =skills.id) group by name

data.question: Please give me the employees ids and names having a skill in 'Docker' and experience in DevOps.
data.sql_query_ref: select employees.id, employees.name from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id join tasks on projects_id=projects.id join assignedTo on tasks_id=tasks.id join skills on assignedTo_id=assignedTo.id join secondary on skills_id =skills.id where  (secondary.value='Docker' or skills."primary"='Docker') and exists( select * from  experience join domains on experience_id=experience.id  where experience.skills_id=skills.id  and domains.value='DevOps')

data.question: Please give me the total number of tasks.
data.sql_query_ref: select  count(*) from tasks

data.question: Please give me the number of projects for employees.
data.sql_query_ref: select employees.name,count(*) from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join projects on profile_id=profile.id group by employees.name

data.question: Wich employee is nearest to the coordinates: 52.52437° north, 13.41053° east.
data.sql_query_ref: select employeesName from(select employees.name as employeesName, geo.lat, geo.long, sqrt( (geo.lat- 52.52437)*(geo.lat- 52.52437)+(geo.long - 13.41053)*(geo.long - 13.41053)) as geodiff from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join contact on profile_id=profile.id join address on contact_id=contact.Id join location on address_id=address.Id join geo on location_id=location.Id order by geodiff asc limit 1)

data.question: In wich cities most employees live.
data.sql_query_ref: select city from (select address.city, count(*) as count from employees join profile on employees_id=employees.Id join contact on profile_id=profile.id join address on contact_id=contact.Id group by address.city order by count desc limit 1)

data.question: Give me the sorted list of employee names. Use only the first 5 results.
data.sql_query_ref: select name from employees order by name asc limit 5
